summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Crystal CLI Sprint 1 features and frontend hero line styling. All 10 CLI commands working correctly, new features (test, fix-prompt, --stage flag) functioning as expected.
passed_tests: CLI: crystal --help shows all 10 commands (init, check, status, handoff, gates, report, architect, test, fix-prompt, mcp)
CLI: crystal test tests/fixtures/good_project runs pytest and shows 1/1 passing (100%)
CLI: crystal fix-prompt tests/fixtures/bad_project generates detailed fix prompts with WHY explanations for 18 issues
CLI: crystal check tests/fixtures/good_project --stage local runs LOCAL gates, all pass with A (100/100)
CLI: crystal check tests/fixtures/bad_project --stage local catches 18 issues and shows fix-prompt tip
CLI: crystal check tests/fixtures/good_project --stage staging runs STAGING gates with 1 env var issue
CLI: crystal check tests/fixtures/good_project --stage production runs PRODUCTION gates including test execution
CLI: crystal check tests/fixtures/good_project defaults to local stage and returns A (100/100)
Frontend: Hero line 3 displays correctly as one styled line with blue accents on 'architecture integrity' and 'domain purity'
Frontend: All major sections load correctly (navigation, hero, problem, solution, quick-start, features, commands)
Frontend: Terminal block displays properly with Crystal CLI examples
